title: Mugam Theriya Lyrics Kuttram 23
stanzas:
Mugam theriya uyir thudikka
mugam thiruppi selvadhu
kuttram thaan.
nanban vizhi kasigaiyile
un naluval kuttram thaan.

needhi mandram sollvadhu
mattum kuttram illai.
nenjam sollum niyayathai
kaeladaa

valeduthu kolvadhu
mattum kuttram illai.
vaarthaigalaal kolvadhum
kuttram thaan.

unai nambi varum pennaiye
nirgathiyaai viduthal kutram
unnai uyiraakkiya petrorai
maraththal kuttram.

kuttrathin thozhan aasai
kuttrathil vaasal kobam
kuttrathin palane paavam
kuttrangal vazhvin saabam(2)

Mugam theriya uyir thudikka
mugam thiruppi selvadhu
kuttram thaan.
nanban vizhi kasigaiyile
un naluval kuttram thaan.

arivugalin koochchal kuttram,
meimarakkum aanmeegathil.
alavedutha vaarthai kuttram,
nanbargal koodaarathil.(2)

kuttrathin thozhan aasai
kuttrathil vaasal kobam
kuttrathin palane paavam
kuttrangal vazhvin saabam(2)

Mugam theriya uyir thudikka
mugam thiruppi selvadhu
kuttram thaan.
nanban vizhi kasigaiyile
un naluval kuttram thaan.

ovvoruvan kuttrathirkkum
avanukkena niyayam undu.
irudhiyaai kaalam sollum
niyayangalin sabaiyil nindru

kuttrathin thozhan aasai
kuttrathil vaasal kobam
kuttrathin palane paavam
kuttrangal vazhvin saabam(2)

Mugam theriya uyir thudikka
mugam thiruppi selvadhu
kuttram thaan.
nanban vizhi kasigaiyile
un naluval kuttram thaan.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Mugam Theriya explores themes of identity and emotional struggle, reflecting on the consequences of one's actions.

How does this song fit into the plot of Kuttram 23?

The song underscores the protagonist's internal conflict and the moral dilemmas faced throughout the movie.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented K.G. Ranjith, known for his emotive vocal style.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by Vivek, who is renowned for his impactful songwriting in Tamil cinema.

When was this song released?

Mugam Theriya was released on September 1, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mugam Theriya, the protagonist grapples with deep emotional pain and the consequences of their actions. The song's melancholic tone and poignant lyrics evoke feelings of heartbreak and reflection. Set against the backdrop of Kuttram 23, it serves as a powerful reminder of the struggles within oneself. The haunting melody and K.G. Ranjith's soulful rendition make it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mugam Theriya from the gripping thriller Kuttram 23 captures the essence of sorrow and introspection. Sung beautifully by K.G. Ranjith, this song resonates with anyone who has faced emotional turmoil. The poignant lyrics by Vivek add depth to the haunting melody, making it a must-listen for Tamil music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Not knowing the face is a crime that makes life suffer; your friend's gaze is a crime in itself.
Only saying justice in court is not a crime. Listen to the truth that the heart speaks.
Only taking away is not a crime. Taking away with words is a crime.
Believing in a woman who comes to you is a crime; forgetting those who gave you life is a crime.
Even if the eyes are opened, it is still a crime, crime, crime.
The desire for crime is anger at the door of crime; the many crimes of crime are the curse of life.
Not knowing the face is a crime that makes life suffer; your friend's gaze is a crime in itself.
The gathering of knowledge is a crime that can erase the truth; the words that are spoken are a crime when friends gather.
Looking at the talent is a crime. Speaking of separation is a crime.
Forgetting friendship is a crime, just like losing it is a crime.
The desire for crime is anger at the door of crime; the many crimes of crime are the curse of life.
Not knowing the face is a crime that makes life suffer; your friend's gaze is a crime in itself.
Everyone has justice for their crimes. Standing in the court of justice that time speaks of.
Humans are the ones who kill humans.
For every tear shed, God is the leader of the fallen.
The desire for crime is anger at the door of crime; the many crimes of crime are the curse of life.
Not knowing the face is a crime that makes life suffer; your friend's gaze is a crime in itself.
